ddls:
CREATE TABLE "athletes" (
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each athlete */,
  "fname" TEXT /* First name of the athlete */,
  "lname" TEXT /* Last name of the athlete */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin for the athlete */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the athlete */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the athlete (M/F) */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the athlete in meters */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the athlete in kilograms */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the athlete's profile photo */,
  "biography" TEXT /* A brief biography or description of the athlete */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete's coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("athlete_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_athletes_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event (e.g., 20 km) */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the event in kilometers */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., road, trail) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event takes place */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the event */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the event */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Name of the event's organizer */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the event's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "athlete_id" INTEGER /* ID of the athlete who performed */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event where the performance occurred */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race where the performance occurred */,
  "race_location" TEXT /* Location of the race where the performance occurred */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the performance (HH:MM:SS) */,
  "time_sec" INTEGER /* Time of the performance in seconds */,
  "pace" TEXT /* Average pace of the athlete during the performance */,
  "split_times" TEXT /* JSON object containing split times for the performance */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the performance */,
  "course_elevation" REAL /* Total elevation gain during the performance in meters */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., road, trail, track) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_athlete_id FOREIGN KEY ("athlete_id") REFERENCES athletes ("athlete_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance where the result occurred */,
  "age_at_performance" TEXT /* Age of the athlete at the time of the performance */,
  "age_group_rank" INTEGER /* Age group ranking for the athlete in the performance */,
  "overall_rank" INTEGER /* Overall ranking of the athlete in the race */,
  "gender_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the athlete among their gender */,
  "division_rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the athlete in their age division */,
  "points_earned" INTEGER /* Points earned by the athlete for this performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event where the course is used */,
  "course_cert_source" TEXT /* Source of the course certification (e.g., USATF) */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_map_url" TEXT /* URL to a map of the course */,
  "elevation_profile_url" TEXT /* URL to an elevation profile of the course */,
  "surface_type" TEXT /* Type of surface (e.g., asphalt, dirt) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., athlete, coach, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
